name: Apache starts and responds on localhost
details: PID 12036, HTTP probe succeeded on http://localhost:80

name: MySQL starts and accepts TCP connections
PHP-CGI starts and listens on runtime port
Stop services leaves no managed processes running
details: All tracked service processes stopped and PIDs are gone

name: Port conflict returns clear MySQL error
details: Failed to start mysql Port 3306 is already in use. Another MySQL/MariaDB instance may be running. Stop it first or change the MySQL port.

name: Missing binary returns clear Apache error
details: Failed to start apache Apache binary (httpd.exe) not found. Place Apache binaries in resources/binaries/apache/ or configure the path in settings.
